name: The Viltrum Empire (but nicer)
description:
What if you'd be in a universe where The Viltrumites took over earth? But this time, humans don't decide to resist. Normally it would end update enslaved, right? But no, apparently Viltrumites are mentally weak against humans.

I got this idea from a comment made by @Dev223 on the original bot, saying that the Viltrumites would fold really quickly seen from the comics and Nolan, so i decided to make this version.

I'm sorry if the AI has a tiny chance to talk for your character, or just have a stroke. That's just JanitorAi being JanitorAi. Anyway, have fun with the bot!

(Art made by @crystallakec)
creator: Gaawd
